title: Sharing interactive calendar outside monday with event durations and column information

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
View demo

You can now share or embed your calendar outside monday with

  • event durations;
  • column information;
  • interactive navigation;
  • day, week, month, and year views.

This means you can:

  • report detailed events to that boss or that department that doesn’t use monday
  • send the calendar to your crews out in the field
  • access the calendar on the go from your phone
  • build a booking system using clickable links and synced appointments from Google Calendar
  • save on monday seat costs

Install using the button below, or access the How to page.
